case_title: KARIM HENDRY TAHIR VS. FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-01-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ROBERT JEROME RUDOLPH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-11-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-28-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER(S), OR DEFAULT(S) AND NO PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE SEP-17-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-20-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-01-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AGAINST ROBERT JEROME RUDOLPH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-30-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-16-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
